summary: P0 Google Sign-In Migration Testing Complete - All features verified. Custom Google Identity Services (GIS) flow working correctly. Backend /api/auth/google-signin endpoint exists and properly rejects invalid tokens with 401. Email/password login regression test passed. Login/Signup pages render native Google buttons in iframes. CSP includes accounts.google.com. No auth.emergentagent.com references in primary auth flow. AuthCallback error page shows 'Try Again' and 'Back to Home' buttons.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Sign-In migration fully tested. Custom GIS flow replaces Emergent-hosted auth. Backend endpoint /api/auth/google-signin validates Google ID tokens server-side. Old /api/auth/google-callback still works for backward compatibility. Cannot test full Google OAuth e2e (requires real Google account in Testing mode).

tests: Returns proper error message for invalid credential
Google button renders in iframe (native GIS)
No console errors related to Google Identity Services
Google button renders in iframe (native GIS)
No console errors related to Google Identity Services
Login page: No references to auth.emergentagent.com
Signup page: No references to auth.emergentagent.com
AuthCallback error page: No Emergent redirect
No Emergent redirect in error state
CSP meta tag includes accounts.google.com in script-src
CSP meta tag includes accounts.google.com in frame-src
CSP meta tag includes accounts.google.com in style-src
Login page has prefetch link for /app in document head
Signup page has prefetch link for /app in document head

limitations.cannot_test_full_google_oauth: Google OAuth app is in Testing mode - only test users added in Google Console can actually sign in. Full e2e test requires real browser with real Google account.
